name.description: Name or description of the gross pay line item.

type.description:
Categorized type of gross pay, based on `name`. Used in `gross_pay_list_totals`.
- `base`
- `pto`
- `overtime`
- `commission`
- `bonus`
- `disability`
- `benefits`
- `tips`
- `stock`
- `other`

start_date.description: Timestamp ([ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601)) of the start of the work period.

end_date.description: Timestamp ([ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601)) of the end of the work period.

rate.description: Hourly rate of gross pay earnings for this line item.

hours.description: Hours worked for this line item.

amount.description: Gross pay earned from this line item.

hours_ytd.description: Total hours worked year-to-date related to this gross pay line item, including this paystub's work period.

amount_ytd.description: Total gross pay earned year-to-date related to this gross pay line item, including this paystub.
